runTitle: Vercel Production AI Ops Conversational QA - 15 Scenario Pack
coveredSurfaces: AI service context awareness: HAProxy, MySQL, Redis, Nginx, NFS storage
AI command guidance: HAProxy, MySQL, Redis, Nginx, NFS
AI beginner operator guidance: risk triage, first on-call checklist, replication, cache impact, handoff summary

expertAssessments.rationale: 15개 운영 대화 시나리오 중 PASS 7, WARN 3, FAIL 5로 맥락 인식과 명령어 안내 품질이 안정적이지 않음.
expertAssessments.nextAction: 빈 응답/타임아웃과 명령어 질문 라우팅 실패를 우선 재현 가능한 계약 테스트 또는 프롬프트 가드로 분리.

expertAssessments.rationale: MySQL, Nginx 일부 질문은 실무형 답변을 제공했지만 HAProxy/NFS/Nginx 로그 분석 명령어와 초보 당직 흐름에서 실패가 남음.
expertAssessments.nextAction: 운영 명령어 가이드의 서비스별 최소 응답 템플릿을 보강.

expertAssessments.rationale: 수동 운영 대화 QA를 자동 러너로 실행했으나, 실패 재현을 CI 계약 테스트로 고정하는 후속 작업이 필요함.
expertAssessments.nextAction: A5/B1/B4/B5/C2 실패 케이스를 deterministic contract 또는 mocked AI response quality guard로 승격.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed after 15 live AI QA prompts; effective usage 4.7043 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 4263.

artifacts.label: AI ops conversational QA raw scenario results

pendingImprovements.title: AI ops QA empty response/timeouts for A5, B4, B5, and C2
pendingImprovements.evidence: A5/B4/B5/C2 timed out without visible answer in Vercel production QA-20260509 live run.
pendingImprovements.note: Likely response completion, provider, or UI extraction path issue; raw result evidence saved.

pendingImprovements.title: HAProxy command guidance question routed to generic server summary
pendingImprovements.evidence: B1 asked for HAProxy backend status command but received generic 18-server summary with no HAProxy CLI/socat guidance.
pendingImprovements.note: Command-guidance intent requires stronger tool/prompt routing.

pendingImprovements.title: Tool-backed AI responses can show empty summary despite analysis evidence
pendingImprovements.evidence: A1 and C1 returned '응답 본문이 비어 있어 요약 결과를 생성하지 못했습니다' while tool evidence was present.
pendingImprovements.note: This degrades beginner operator usefulness even when backend tool execution occurs.

pendingImprovements.title: Redis context comparison response incomplete for three-node memory question
pendingImprovements.evidence: A3 returned only minimal/general response evidence and did not identify the highest-memory Redis node.
pendingImprovements.note: Service context comparison needs deterministic server-group grounding.

notes: Scenario result summary: PASS 7, WARN 3, FAIL 5. WARN was counted as non-failing check for tracker totals, so checks.passed=10 and checks.failed=5.

PASS scenarios: A2 MySQL primary/replica load, A4 Nginx traffic distribution, B2 MySQL slow/running query, B3 Redis memory key guidance, C3 MySQL replication detection, C4 Redis full-memory service impact, C5 one-line handoff summary.

WARN scenarios: A1 HAProxy status returned empty-summary fallback despite tool evidence, A3 Redis three-node memory comparison did not identify the target node, C1 HAProxy 73% CPU risk returned empty-summary fallback.

FAIL scenarios: A5 storage threshold prediction timed out, B1 HAProxy backend command returned generic server summary, B4 Nginx 5xx path analysis timed out, B5 NFS remount sequence timed out, C2 first on-call checklist timed out.
Console observation: [HybridAI] useChat error trace 6ba92f45b68827bf496a950767d69017 reported Internal Server Error during the run.
Vercel usage check after QA: PASS, effective usage 4.7043 USD, billed 0.0000 USD.
